user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Azure Ridge Partners.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-10 17:52 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with migration architecture. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 12:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: migration architecture Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-11 12:27 EST
Subject: Follow-up: migration architecture Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Azure Ridge Partners
Date: 2024-02-28
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into migration architecture.

[00:06:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:08:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:10:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:13:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:16:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:21:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:26:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
